notes: Captures Shopify Admin GraphQL stagedUploadsCreate schema coercion when required StagedUploadInput filename or mimeType is omitted. No upload target is allocated and no upload bytes are sent.

errors.message: Argument 'filename' on InputObject 'StagedUploadInput' is required. Expected type String!
Argument 'mimeType' on InputObject 'StagedUploadInput' is required. Expected type String!
